marcus.name: Marcus 'The Pixel Bandit'
marcus.description: Notorious for stealing ordinary footage and transforming it into extraordinary visual experiences. Approach with caution - carries dangerous levels of creative vision and technical expertise.

sofia.name: Sofia 'The Frame Thief'
sofia.description: Wanted for stealing impossible creative briefs and turning them into award-winning masterpieces. Armed with strategic thinking and dangerous levels of project management skills.

jake.name: Jake 'The Render Rogue'
jake.description: Ringleader of rendering crimes, orchestrating elaborate computational operations. Wanted for leading sophisticated processing schemes that push hardware beyond its limits.

maya.name: Maya 'The Code Crusher'
maya.description: Wanted for conjuring flawless code from chaotic requirements using forbidden programming magic. Known to transform complex problems into elegant solutions with mysterious technical powers.

connor.name: Connor 'The Digital Desperado'
connor.description: Mastermind behind revolutionary content creation operations. Wanted for disrupting traditional production methods and making competitors question their entire approach.

zara.name: Zara 'The Motion Maverick'
zara.description: Notorious for crafting motion graphics so smooth they defy the laws of physics. Armed with After Effects mastery and a dangerous eye for kinetic perfection.

leo.name: Leo 'The Effect Enforcer'
leo.description: A nomadic visual effects outlaw who drifts from project to project, leaving behind a trail of jaw-dropping composites and impossible cinematic magic. Master of the digital realm.
